meaning: v.(使)再改宗,(使)恢复党籍,(使)恢复故态
examples: It will need other chips to reconvert the digital code back into normal TV signals.
You'll need the memo when you reconvert the unused RMB back into foreign currency.
You can modify the return type to NUMBER (see Figure 4) and reconvert the function.
Taxpayers who now are reversing 2011 Roth conversions need only wait 30 days to reconvert the same money, Nutter's Ms. Choate says.
In other words, if you undo the conversion on Oct. 17, you can reconvert the same assets as soon as Nov. 18.
